[[File:Spria chathead.png|left]]
'''Spria''' is a [[Slayer master]] and daughter of [[Turael]]. She lives in a house in [[Draynor Village]] and assists the player with [[Sarah]]'s bounty during the quest [[A Porcine of Interest]].

After the quest, she acts as a Slayer master, assigning the same tasks as her father Turael, with the addition of being able to assign [[sourhog]]s. She is the only Slayer master who can assign them. However, she cannot change a Slayer task from another master into a less difficult one; she will instruct players to visit Turael to do so. Additionally, players cannot skip Spria's tasks using Turael. Completing a task assigned by her will always reward 0 points.

Blocking a task with Spria costs 40 [[Slayer reward point]]s and the block list is shared with [[Turael]]/[[Aya]].

Note: Spria is a valid contact for the [[NPC Contact]] spell, and you can obtain tasks from them.  It is part of the [[Lunar spellbook]].

{{Subject changes
|date = 27 August 2025
|update = Summer Sweep Up Slayer & More
|change = 
* Blocking a [[Slayer]] task with Spria now costs 40 [[Slayer reward point]]s.
* [[Turael]], [[Aya]] and Spria now share a block list.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 8 May 2024
|update = Project Rebalance: Skilling & Poll 81 MTA Changes

|change = Various minimum and maximum quantities of Slayer tasks have been reduced.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 15 November 2023
|update = Leagues IV - Trailblazer Reloaded
|change = The [[Slayer cape]]'s perk now works with Spria.
}}
{{Subject changes footer}}

==Trivia==
* In ''RuneScape 3'', Spria replaces Turael as Burthorpe's Slayer Master during and after [[While Guthix Sleeps]]. As Spria was added prior to the ''Old School RuneScape'' release of While Guthix Sleeps, [[Aya]] is instead the replacement for Turael.
* She appears to be wearing a [[binding necklace]], [[Antisanta boots]], [[leather chaps]], and modified versions of [[Karil's crossbow]] and [[adamant platebody]].
* Her quote "Still breathin', eh?" during the quest is a reference to Path of Exile from an Act III NPC named "Hargan".
